ucs.title: [LLM] Akira (Howling Scorpius) RClone-to-MEGA exfil staging followed by VSS shadow-copy wipe
ucs.description: Catches Akira's signature pre-encryption chain: bulk file staging via rclone.exe (frequently renamed) syncing to mega.io / mega.nz / mega.co.nz, paired within hours with deletion of Volume Shadow Copies via vssadmin/wmic/PowerShell on the same host - the documented Akira playbook before the megazord encryptor runs.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as exfil_cmd from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name=rclone.exe OR Processes.process=*"rclone"* OR Processes.original_file_name=rclone.exe) (Processes.process=*mega* OR Processes.process=*"copy"* OR Processes.process=*"sync"*) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename dest as exfil_host | join type=inner exfil_host [| tstats summariesonly=true count as vss_count values(Processes.process) as vss_cmd values(Processes.process_name) as vss_proc from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where ((Processes.process_name=vssadmin.exe Processes.process=*"delete shadows"*) OR (Processes.process_name=wmic.exe Processes.process=*shadowcopy* Processes.process=*delete*) OR ((Processes.process_name=powershell.exe OR Processes.process_name=pwsh.exe) (Processes.process=*"Win32_Shadowcopy"* OR Processes.process=*"vssadmin*delete*"*))) by Processes.dest | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename dest as exfil_host | fields exfil_host vss_count vss_cmd vss_proc] | where lastTime - firstTime < 86400 | table firstTime exfil_host user process_name exfil_cmd vss_cmd vss_proc
ucs.kql:
let Lookback = 7d;
let Window = 24h;
let ExfilNames = dynamic(["rclone.exe","winscp.exe","winscp.com","filezilla.exe"]);
let RcloneStaging =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where FileName in~ (ExfilNames)
         or ProcessVersionInfoOriginalFileName in~ ("rclone.exe","WinSCP.exe")
         or ProcessCommandLine has_any ("mega.io","mega.nz","mega.co.nz",":mega:","--config","copy "," sync ","--transfers")
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("mega","transfer.sh","anonfiles","gofile","sftp://","ftp://","copy "," sync ")
    | project ExfilTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              ExfilProc = FileName, ExfilCmd = ProcessCommandLine, ExfilSHA256 = SHA256;
let ShadowWipe =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete shadows")
         or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
         or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
             and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Win32_Shadowcopy","Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadow","Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadow","Get-CimInstance Win32_Shadow"))
         or (FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("recoveryenabled No","bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"))
         or (FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("delete","catalog"))
    | project WipeTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, WipeProc = FileName, WipeCmd = ProcessCommandLine;
RcloneStaging
| join kind=inner ShadowWipe on DeviceId
| where WipeTime between (ExfilTime - Window .. ExfilTime + Window)
| project ExfilTime, WipeTime,
          DeltaMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', WipeTime, ExfilTime),
          DeviceName, AccountName,
          ExfilProc, ExfilCmd, ExfilSHA256,
          WipeProc, WipeCmd
| order by ExfilTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let Lookback = 7d;
let Window = 24h;
let ExfilNames = dynamic(["rclone.exe","winscp.exe","winscp.com","filezilla.exe"]);
let RcloneStaging =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend ChildName = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, @"\")[-1]))
    | where ChildName in (ExfilNames)
         or CommandLine has_any ("mega.io","mega.nz","mega.co.nz",":mega:"," sync "," copy ","--transfers","--config")
    | where CommandLine has_any ("mega","transfer.sh","anonfiles","gofile","sftp://","ftp://"," sync "," copy ")
    | project ExfilTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ExfilProc = ChildName, ExfilCmd = CommandLine;
let ShadowWipe =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | extend ChildName = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, @"\")[-1]))
    | where (ChildName == "vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has "delete shadows")
         or (ChildName == "wmic.exe" and CommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
         or (ChildName in ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
             and CommandLine has_any ("Win32_Shadowcopy","Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadow","Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadow","Get-CimInstance Win32_Shadow"))
         or (ChildName == "bcdedit.exe" and CommandLine has_any ("recoveryenabled No","bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"))
         or (ChildName == "wbadmin.exe" and CommandLine has_all ("delete","catalog"))
    | project WipeTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, WipeProc = ChildName, WipeCmd = CommandLine;
RcloneStaging
| join kind=inner ShadowWipe on Computer
| where WipeTime between (ExfilTime - Window .. ExfilTime + Window)
| project ExfilTime, WipeTime,
          DeltaMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', WipeTime, ExfilTime),
          Computer, Account,
          ExfilProc, ExfilCmd, WipeProc, WipeCmd
| order by ExfilTime desc
ucs.rationale: Akira's post-intrusion playbook (CISA AA24-109A, Sophos X-Ops, Arctic Wolf, Unit 42) is consistent: stage data with rclone or WinSCP to MEGA, then immediately wipe VSS via vssadmin/wmic/PowerShell Win32_Shadowcopy and disable recovery with bcdedit before launching the megazord/Akira encryptor. Either half of this chain alone is noisy; the same-host correlation in a <24h window is an Akira fingerpr

ucs.title: [LLM] Akira (PUNK SPIDER) AnyDesk / RustDesk silent persistence install paired with internal RDP hop
ucs.description: Detects Akira's documented persistence pattern: dropping AnyDesk.exe or RustDesk.exe into Public/ProgramData with an unattended-install command line and an Akira-style password file (e.g. p.txt / pass.txt), followed by an outbound AnyDesk relay or an inbound RDP from the same host - the bridge between Cisco VPN initial access and lateral movement seen in CISA AA24-109A.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime values(Processes.process) as install_cmd values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name=AnyDesk.exe OR Processes.process_name=anydesk.exe OR Processes.process_name=RustDesk.exe OR Processes.process_name=rustdesk.exe) (Processes.process=*"--install"* OR Processes.process=*"--silent"* OR Processes.process=*"--start-with-win"* OR Processes.process=*"--set-password"* OR Processes.process=*"--password"*) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process_path | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | where match(process_path,"(?i)\\\\(Public|ProgramData|Users\\\\Public|Temp)\\\\") | rename dest as install_host | join type=inner install_host [| tstats summariesonly=true count as rdp_count values(All_Traffic.dest_ip) as rdp_targets from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where All_Traffic.dest_port=3389 All_Traffic.action=allowed by All_Traffic.src | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Traffic)` | rename src as install_host | where rdp_count >= 1] | table firstTime install_host user process_name parent install_cmd rdp_targets
ucs.kql:
let Lookback = 7d;
let Window = 4h;
let RemoteToolBins = dynamic(["anydesk.exe","rustdesk.exe","screenconnect.exe","connectwisecontrol.exe"]);
let SilentInstall =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where FileName in~ (RemoteToolBins)
         or ProcessVersionInfoOriginalFileName in~ ("AnyDesk.exe","RustDesk.exe")
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("--install","--silent","--start-with-win","--set-password","--password","/silent","/S "," -s ")
         or InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (@"\Users\Public\", @"\ProgramData\", @"\Windows\Temp\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\")
    | where FolderPath !startswith @"C:\Program Files"
         and FolderPath !startswith @"C:\Program Files (x86)"
    | project InstallTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              InstallProc = FileName, InstallPath = FolderPath,
              InstallCmd = ProcessCommandLine, ParentProc = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
let RdpEgress =
    DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where ActionType in ("ConnectionSuccess","ConnectionAttempt")
    | where RemotePort == 3389 or RemotePort in (5938, 7070, 6568, 21115, 21116, 21117, 21118, 21119)
    | project HopTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, RemoteIP, RemotePort,
              HopProc = InitiatingProcessFileName, HopCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
SilentInstall
| join kind=inner RdpEgress on DeviceId
| where HopTime between (InstallTime .. InstallTime + Window)
| summarize HopCount = count(),
            RemoteTargets = make_set(strcat(tostring(RemoteIP),":",tostring(RemotePort)), 25),
            HopProcs = make_set(HopProc, 10),
            arg_min(HopTime, *)
            by InstallTime, DeviceName, AccountName, InstallProc, InstallPath, InstallCmd, ParentProc
| order by InstallTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let Lookback = 7d;
let Window = 4h;
let RemoteToolBins = dynamic(["anydesk.exe","rustdesk.exe","screenconnect.exe","connectwisecontrol.exe"]);
let SilentInstall =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend ChildName = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, @"\")[-1])),
             ChildPath = tolower(NewProcessName)
    | where ChildName in (RemoteToolBins)
    | where CommandLine has_any ("--install","--silent","--start-with-win","--set-password","--password","/silent","/S "," -s ")
         or ChildPath has_any (@"\users\public\", @"\programdata\", @"\windows\temp\", @"\appdata\local\temp\")
    | where ChildPath !startswith @"c:\program files"
    | project InstallTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
              InstallProc = ChildName, InstallPath = NewProcessName,
              InstallCmd = CommandLine, ParentProc = ParentProcessName;
let RdpEgress =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where EventID == 5156
    | extend dport = toint(extract(@"Destination Port:\s+(\d+)", 1, EventData))
    | where dport in (3389, 5938, 7070, 6568, 21115, 21116, 21117, 21118, 21119)
    | project HopTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, RemotePort = dport;
SilentInstall
| join kind=inner RdpEgress on Computer
| where HopTime between (InstallTime .. InstallTime + Window)
| summarize HopCount = count(), RemotePorts = make_set(RemotePort, 10), arg_min(HopTime, *)
            by InstallTime, Computer, Account, InstallProc, InstallPath, InstallCmd, ParentProc
| order by InstallTime desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Akira AnyDesk/RustDesk Silent Install From Non-Standard Path
id: a4c1ef07-0b8e-4f6e-9a13-akira-anydesk-rustdesk
status: experimental
description: Detects unattended install of AnyDesk or RustDesk dropped to Public/ProgramData/Temp - persistence pattern documented for Akira / Howling Scorpius (CISA AA24-109A).
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa24-109a
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/06
tags:
  - attack.persistence
  - attack.command_and_control
  - attack.t1219
  - attack.t1133
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_img:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\AnyDesk.exe'
      - '\anydesk.exe'
      - '\RustDesk.exe'
      - '\rustdesk.exe'
  selection_args:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '--install'
      - '--silent'
      - '--start-with-win'
      - '--set-password'
      - '--password'
  filter_legit_path:
    Image|startswith:
      - 'C:\Program Files\'
      - 'C:\Program Files (x86)\'
  condition: selection_img and selection_args and not filter_legit_path
falsepositives:
  - Sanctioned IT remote-support deployment from imaging tooling
level: high
ucs.rationale: Multiple IR reports (CISA AA24-109A, S-RM, Sophos X-Ops) document Akira/Howling Scorpius/PUNK SPIDER specifically dropping AnyDesk (and increasingly RustDesk in 2024-25 intrusions) into C:\ProgramData or C:\Users\Public with --install --silent --set-password to create unattended remote access after initial Cisco ASA/AnyConnect VPN access without MFA. Pairing the silent-install + non-standard path
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID
